famous quote:
Be stronger than your strongest excuse.
-anonymous
Interview Text:
Chris S.

(part 2)

At the dinner table he told us a recent story in which he went to the Chief Financial Officer of Morrocco's Nationalized airline of Morrocco to ask for free shipment of medical supplies. The previous CFO of the airline had given them free shipment of all the supplies. But this was a new guy.

Chris had tried to schedule a meeting but they did not have it on their books. He said he would come back to talk to him the next day, even though he didn't have an appointment. When he came back the next day and sat down in the lobby, a young woman sat down as well. He asked her who she was and what she was there for. She said she was the CFO's lawyer and she was there for the meeting they had with Chris. Chris thought, "this might not be good."

After they finally led Chris into a room, after waiting for a moment the CFO stormed in and in French, Arabic, and English said, "Who are you to take up my time for this?!"

Chris was taken aback but said, "Give me 60 seconds to tell you what I've done for the youth in Morrocco." He told him, and then he said, "Who are YOU that when you die you can tell God that you refused to help medical supplies come in to your country for the youth. 

By the end of the 16 minute conversation the man said, I will give you what you ask, and here is a frequent flyer card because I want you to come more often and have coffee with me in my home whenever you come. 

Chris says he has worked on fostering his intuition for his whole life. He goes into these meetings not knowing what he will say but he listens and watches for the details, and he says what comes to him. He says this is how the Holy Spirit works in him.

And I think it's very Biblical ("Do not worry about what you will say, I will give you the words", and lines up with what a lot of other people have said to me in this book. That you listen to the inner voice, but you have to practice it.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
